tech_news.title: ‘WhatsApp Plus’ subscription launching soon with new features - 9to5Mac
tech_news.description: WhatsApp is planning a new ‘WhatsApp Plus’ paid subscription, and it just went live in the app’s Android beta ahead of an iOS launch.

tech_news.title: Google rolls out Gemini in Chrome in 7 new countries - TechCrunch
tech_news.description: Google is rolling out Gemini in Chrome in Australia, Indonesia, Japan, the Philippines, Singapore, South Korea, and Vietnam. The company is rolling this feature out to both desktop and iOS in all of these countries except Japan.

tech_news.title: Apple names Johny Srouji as chief hardware officer - The Verge
tech_news.description: Apple has appointed Johny Srouji as its new hardware chief, replacing soon-to-be CEO John Ternus.

tech_news.title: Silicon Valley has forgotten what normal people want - The Verge
tech_news.description: NFTs, the metaverse and AI are the most recent Silicon Valley enthusiasms. Does anyone remember how to build a consumer product?
